candidate_check.description: The period of time before the bad logon counter is reset must be configured to 15 minutes.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the effective setting in Local Group Policy Editor.
Run "gpedit.msc".

Navigate to Local Computer Policy >> Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Account Policies >> Account Lockout Policy.

If the "Reset account lockout counter after" value is less than "15" minutes, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Account Policies >> Account Lockout Policy >> "Reset account lockout counter after" to "15" minutes.
title: The period of time before the bad logon counter is reset must be configured to 15 minutes.
